goal: Restore stable navigation for item, monster, and reverse pages; simplify training quick actions; highlight best support comparison values.
stabilityFixes: Removed old garbled item/monster enhancement patches from initial loading.
Restored explicit window.SZOAppInit assignment so the app always binds events after scripts load.
Rebuilt script-loader.js with clean status messages and error handling.
Starts the main item/monster/reverse data load in the background after the home page is ready.
trainingChanges: Quick actions are now 全部滿階 and 全部歸0.
全部歸0 sets both current and target levels to 0.
supportCompareChanges: Each stat row highlights the highest value.
Tied highest values are highlighted together.
